text: Which of the following may be used as additional security measures?

options.text: Leaving gangways unattended to decoy intruders
Isolating fire main fire line hydrants
Removing side pilot ladders during active operations

explanation: Additional security measures include physical barriers like gratings to restrict access to sensitive spaces like companionways. Leaving gangways unattended, isolating fire hydrants, or removing pilots during operations would severely compromise ship security and safety.
